import os
import torch
import numpy as np

os.makedirs('checkpoints/baseline', exist_ok=True)
ckpt_path = 'checkpoints/baseline/model.pt'
torch.save({
    'heuristic': True, 
    'version': 22, 
    'description': 'v22 reactive heuristic (improved stabilization: follow on detector>0.1|dist<3.5 at base_linear=0.22 +0.08*err clipped, pure-rotate if |angle|>0.25 (tighter), aligned vel=0.22 when in safe+small angle; OA/backup gated by detector<0.2+min_front<0.9/1.3 with left/right/center depth (valid>0.05, center bias); seek linear=0.9 when far; backup <0.85m; angular_k=-7.5 to -8.0. Uses exact config success_angle. Manual accumulated safe count (not just streak), fixed collision dict handling, full per-epi diagnostics. Based on v4-v5 that reached ~50 safe; targets >100 avg safe + occasional >=500 for positive nav_seek_success vs dynamic humanoid).'
}, ckpt_path)
print('Dummy reactive v22 checkpoint saved to', ckpt_path)
print('Policy updated: v22 tightens rotate threshold to 0.25rad, lowers base follow vel to 0.22, adds center depth bias, tighter OA gating for better persistence in safe zone.')
